#      Entity from the most specific disease leaf (use pipeline's exact label
#      e.g. "R/R MM" not "Multiple myeloma" if r/r is in the title).
#   3. Set Target from the published construct (CD19
#   4. Set ProductType = Autologous / Allogeneic-Off-the-shelf / In vivo.
